commands.name: build-verify
commands.description: Build the project, run unit tests, integration tests, verify server startup, and fix any errors

commands.name: speckit.mas.flow
commands.description: Run Spec-Kit workflow step-by-step in a feature worktree (start, next, status, reset)

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Execute a comprehensive code review using specialized agents to analyze quality, security, performance, and standards compliance with detailed findings and recommendations

commands.name: pr-description
commands.description: Post a description to a PR explaining the changes in the current branch

commands.name: jira-status
commands.description: Post status update to a Jira ticket and check off completed checklist items from changes

description: Custom commands for MediaAssetSearch development workflow
